star_5.text: I'm very pleased with this app. It operates without any faults, but it does help to have some experience using arcade emulators on PC such as MAME. The best part is you can go online and download the rom files (in zip format) for your favorite video games and add them to your collection. I grew up on these games, and there's no better way to kill time on breaks at work than to be playing real arcade games of the past. Highly recommend it!
